phases.title: src reorg
phases.subtitle: filesystem-only: responsibilities as subdirs, shrink >400-line modules — no behaviour change

intent.problem: panel/unfold/unfold.ts is 2683 lines — far over the 400-line cap; its internal seams (view, wires, inspect, session, stage) are already drilled in the map but live in one file.
intent.approach: in-place symbol extraction: carve the seam clusters into sibling files in the same dir; unfold.ts keeps its factory + UnfoldApi surface and imports them back. Cut/paste only, no logic change, public export byte-identical, main.ts untouched.
intent.alternative: leave as-is — rejected, it breaks the per-module size cap the reorg exists to fix.
intent.tradeoff: more files in the dir (moved to seam subfolders in the later folder-move pass).

intent.problem: io/layout.ts (548), io/mermaid.ts (438), render/avoidRouter.ts (446), render/wires.ts (444) all exceed the 400-line cap.
intent.approach: in-place extraction along the map's own subgraph seams (l_api/l_capture/l_order/l_place, mm_api/mm_serialize/mm_parse, ar_api/ar_obstacles/ar_worker/ar_core, w_draw/w_geom). Factory files keep path + export; the new Worker('./avoidWorker.ts') relative specifier is preserved verbatim. main.ts untouched.
intent.tradeoff: shared mutable worker state (pending/routeCache) becomes module-scoped exports across the 3 avoidRouter files.

intent.problem: core/plan/plan.ts (442), interaction/pointer.ts (498), panel/planner/planner.ts (875), ide/contracts/contracts-doc.ts (500), ide/design-loop-render.ts (411) exceed the 400-line cap.
intent.approach: in-place extraction along map seams where tracked (plan: p_shapes/p_analysis/p_apply; pointer: po_start/po_helpers) and by judgment where the map does not track internals (planner draw/info clusters; contracts-doc section builders; design-loop-render one frame builder). Closure-based helpers become factory functions taking explicit params, mirroring existing in-repo patterns. Factory exports byte-identical, main.ts untouched.
intent.tradeoff: closure-to-parameter conversion adds thin factory wrappers in pointer/planner.
